results.rendered_html:
he interj. gaṇa svarādi zu  P. 1,1,37 . cādi zu 4,57 . des Anrufs, he!  AK. 3,5,7 .  H. 1537 . 7,5 . 6 . 16  (auch pādapūraṇe).  MED. avy. 87  (auch asūyādau).  ŚĀṄKH. ŚR. 1,11,1 . vor einem voc.  ŚAT. BR. 3,2,1,23 .  BHAG. 11,41 .  MBH. 8,2037 .  Spr. (II) 5499. fg.  7412 . 7414. fg.  7420. fg.  7500 .  VARĀH. BṚH. S. 74,11 .  PAÑCAT. 37,23 .  VET. in LA. (III) 7,6 . 16,14 . 17,15 . nach einem voc.  Spr. (II) 3914 . 6033 . statt eines voc.: palāyitvā gṛhaṃ gatvā kasya drakṣyatha he sukham  HARIV. 8124 . he3  P. 8,2,85 .
— Vgl. hai.

results.rendered_html:
he ind.
1 A vocative particle (oh!, ho!); he kṛṣṇa he yādava he sakheti  Bg. 11. 41 ; he rājānastyajata sukavipremabaṃthe virodhaṃ  Vikr. 18. 107. 
2 A particle used in challenging.
3 An interjection expressing defiance, envy, ill-will or disapprobation.
